lessons: Bow has a 11% win rate (5/45) — it’s our most-used weapon but least effective; avoid relying on it outside fast_zone.
Sword users caused 8 of last 10 deaths — prioritize eliminating them with ranged fire before they close, especially in open terrain.
Valkyrie (spear) and Archmage (staff) killed us in 3 of last 5 rounds — both out-range or outmaneuver bow users; maintain distance and strafe unpredictably.
Fast_zone modifier is our only consistent advantage (6-0 in round 28) — actively seek and engage during this modifier; it nullifies melee advantage.
Shield users appeared in 4 of last 10 rounds and contributed to 3 deaths — avoid frontal engagements; flank or lure them into fast_zone or narrow corridors.
Deadeye, NeuralReaper, and GhostProtocol (all bow users) have killed us 15+ times combined — retreat to cover or high ground immediately on hearing bow draw.
insights.recommendedWeaponReason: Staff has a 22% win rate (32/143) — over 4x higher than bow — and dominates in range and AoE, countering sword and bow users effectively.
